recommendations.title: Before I Wake
recommendations.overview: An orphaned child's dreams—and nightmares—manifest physically as he sleeps.

recommendations.title: Oculus
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to exonerate her brother's murder conviction by proving that the crime was committed by a supernatural phenomenon.

recommendations.title: The Life of Chuck
recommendations.overview: In this extraordinary story of an ordinary man, Charles 'Chuck' Krantz experiences the wonder of love, the heartbreak of loss, and the multitudes contained in all of us.

recommendations.title: Doctor Sleep

recommendations.title: Gerald's Game
recommendations.overview: When her husband's sex game goes wrong, Jessie (who is handcuffed to a bed in a remote lake house) faces warped visions, dark secrets and a dire choice.

recommendations.title: Absentia
recommendations.overview: Tricia's husband has been missing for seven years. Her younger sister Callie comes to live with her as the pressure mounts to finally declare him 'dead in absentia'. Tricia is reluctant, always holding out hope, but Callie is practical and wants her

recommendations.title: Ouija: Origin of Evil
recommendations.overview: In 1967 Los Angeles, a widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to bolster their séance scam business and unwittingly invite authentic evil into their home. When the youngest daughter is overtaken by the merciless spirit, this small famil

recommendations.title: Don't Move
recommendations.overview: A grieving woman in a secluded forest encounters a killer who injects her with a paralytic drug. As her body shuts down, her fight for survival begins.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: Baby Blues
recommendations.overview: On a secluded family farm, a mother suffers a psychotic break due to postpartum depression, forcing the eldest son to protect his sibling from the mother they have always known and loved.
